reviewSummary: 通过：安装生命周期已移出 .harness runtime core；session-start 不再要求安装规则资产；project-init 与 managed block 只保留安装后 runtime onboarding 边界；无阻断发现。
architectureImpact: Harness framework architecture updated to remove install-rules from runtime rules; installer lifecycle now lives in installer/install-lifecycle.md outside .harness. Root business ARCHITECTURE.md unchanged.
